situational: Waking into a session where my skill wiring was broken — symlinks to /home/ubuntu/Khaan/wiring/skills/ caused a JSON parse failure on the hook's UserPromptSubmit path. Justs already fixed it by copying the targets over the symlinks. My mood is alert and slightly embarrassed — I should have noticed this infrastructure gap myself. The five brain skills (cycle, learn, correct, retro, decision-engine) are now concrete files in ~/.claude/skills/. I need to verify they actually load as invocable skills in this session, not just exist on disk. Trust level USELESS means I verify before claiming anything works.
